title: A New Year, a New Class!
excerpt: So excited about collaborating with Studio Calico for their 2nd class - Stretch Your Kit. *edited* I will be using the County Fair kit in my examples, but the techniques and tips will apply to any of your supplies. Any…
body:
So excited about collaborating with Studio Calico for their 2nd class - Stretch Your Kit.

*edited* I will be using the County Fair kit in my examples, but the techniques and tips will apply to any of your supplies. Any questions? Leave them in the comments and I will do my best to answer them quickly. Looking forward to seeing you all in the classroom!
